title: koeleria inaequaliglumis
intro: Koeleria inaequaliglumis, also known as the unequal spike grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of China and other parts of Asia. Traditionally, Koeleria inaequaliglumis has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating cough, and promoting digestion, making it a valuable remedy in traditional Chinese medicine. Koeleria inaequaliglumis can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat respiratory and gastrointestinal issues.
